allow: PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\); puro upgrade-self 2>&1; puro create stable 2>&1)

PowerShell($env:PATH = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","User"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("PATH","Machine"\); $releases = Invoke-RestMethod "https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/releases_windows.json"; $latest = $releases.releases | Where-Object { $_.channel -eq "stable" } | Select-Object -First 1; Write-Host "Latest stable: $\($latest.version\)"; Write-Host "URL: $\($releases.base_url\)/$\($latest.archive\)")

PowerShell($dest = "$env:USERPROFILE\\flutter_sdk.zip"; $url = "https://storage.googleapis.com/flutter_infra_release/releases/stable/windows/flutter_windows_3.44.2-stable.zip"; Write-Host "Downloading Flutter 3.44.2 to $dest..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $dest -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Download complete. Size: $\(\(Get-Item $dest\).Length / 1MB\) MB")
